definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><variables><variable type="Boolean" id="found">found</variable><variable type="Number" id="sy">sy</variable></variables><block type="java_code" collapsed="true" x="8" y="-90"><field name="CODE">// === 🎯 ИНИЦИАЛИЗАЦИЯ (всегда в начале) ===&#10;net.minecraft.nbt.CompoundTag data = entity.getPersistentData();&#10;final String P = "zg_v";&#10;final String ACTIVE = "zg_active";&#10;final String TICK = "zg_last_tick";&#10;final float DAMPING = 0.99f;&#10;&#10;// === 🚫 РАННИЙ ВЫХОД: креатив/спектатор → принудительно возвращаем нормальную физику ===&#10;if (entity instanceof net.minecraft.world.entity.player.Player player) {&#10;    if (player.getAbilities().flying && (player.isCreative() || player.isSpectator())) {&#10;        // 🔁 Явно вызываем логику восстановления ванильной гравитации&#10;        entity.setNoGravity(false);&#10;        player.getAbilities().setWalkingSpeed(0.1F);&#10;        player.getAbilities().setFlyingSpeed(0.05F);&#10;        player.getAbilities().mayfly = player.isCreative();&#10;        player.onUpdateAbilities();&#10;        &#10;        // 🧹 Очищаем NBT-буфер, чтобы он не конфликтовал с ванильным полётом&#10;        data.remove(P + "x"); data.remove(P + "y"); data.remove(P + "z");&#10;        data.remove(TICK); data.remove(ACTIVE);&#10;        &#10;        return; // ❗ Выходим сразу, код невесомости НЕ выполняется&#10;    }&#10;}&#10;&#10;// === 🔍 ОПРЕДЕЛЕНИЕ: ЕСТЬ ЛИ ГРАВИТАЦИЯ? ===&#10;boolean hasGravity = true;&#10;boolean stationGravity = net.mcreator.ssc.network.Ssc14ModVariables.station_gravity;&#10;&#10;if (!stationGravity) {&#10;    hasGravity = false; // Глобально выключена → сразу невесомость&#10;} else {&#10;    // Глобально включена → ищем любые блоки в радиусе 7 блоков вниз&#10;    boolean foundBlock = false;&#10;    for (int dy = 1; dy <= 7; dy++) {&#10;        net.minecraft.core.BlockPos pos = net.minecraft.core.BlockPos.containing(x, y - dy, z);&#10;        net.minecraft.world.level.block.state.BlockState state = world.getBlockState(pos);&#10;        if (!state.isAir()) {&#10;            foundBlock = true;&#10;            break;&#10;        }&#10;    }&#10;    if (!foundBlock) hasGravity = false; // Блоков нет → невесомость&#10;}&#10;&#10;// === 🔄 ВОССТАНОВЛЕНИЕ ФИЗИКИ (если гравитация вернулась или была включена) ===&#10;if (hasGravity) {&#10;    if (data.contains(ACTIVE) && data.getBoolean(ACTIVE).orElse(false)) {&#10;        entity.setNoGravity(false);&#10;        if (entity instanceof net.minecraft.world.entity.player.Player player) {&#10;            player.getAbilities().setWalkingSpeed(0.1F);&#10;            player.getAbilities().setFlyingSpeed(0.05F);&#10;            player.getAbilities().mayfly = player.isCreative();&#10;            player.onUpdateAbilities();&#10;        }&#10;        data.remove(P + "x"); data.remove(P + "y"); data.remove(P + "z");&#10;        data.remove(TICK); data.remove(ACTIVE);&#10;    }&#10;    return; // ❗ Выходим, код невесомости НЕ выполняется&#10;}&#10;&#10;// === 🌌 ЛОГИКА НЕВЕСОМОСТИ (выполняется только если hasGravity == false) ===&#10;data.putBoolean(ACTIVE, true);&#10;if (data.contains(TICK) && data.getInt(TICK).orElse(0) == entity.tickCount) return;&#10;data.putInt(TICK, entity.tickCount);&#10;&#10;if (entity instanceof net.minecraft.world.entity.player.Player player) {&#10;    player.getAbilities().setWalkingSpeed(0.0F);&#10;    player.getAbilities().setFlyingSpeed(0.0F);&#10;    player.onUpdateAbilities();&#10;}&#10;&#10;entity.setNoGravity(true);&#10;if (!data.contains(P + "x")) {&#10;    net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 init = entity.getDeltaMovement();&#10;    data.putDouble(P + "x", init.x); data.putDouble(P + "y", init.y); data.putDouble(P + "z", init.z);&#10;}&#10;&#10;net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 vel = new net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3(&#10;    data.getDouble(P + "x").orElse(0.0),&#10;    data.getDouble(P + "y").orElse(0.0),&#10;    data.getDouble(P + "z").orElse(0.0)&#10;).scale(DAMPING);&#10;&#10;net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 oldPos = entity.position();&#10;entity.move(net.minecraft.world.entity.MoverType.SELF, vel);&#10;net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 actual = entity.position().subtract(oldPos);&#10;&#10;entity.setDeltaMovement(actual);&#10;data.putDouble(P + "x", actual.x);&#10;data.putDouble(P + "y", actual.y);&#10;data.putDouble(P + "z", actual.z);</field></block><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="0" y="0"><field name="trigger">player_ticks</field><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">// === 🎯 ИНИЦИАЛИЗАЦИЯ ===&#10;net.minecraft.nbt.CompoundTag data = entity.getPersistentData();&#10;final String P = "zg_v";&#10;final String ACTIVE = "zg_active";&#10;final String TICK = "zg_last_tick";&#10;final float DAMPING = 0.99f;&#10;&#10;// 🛡️ Grace period: первые 20 тиков → обычная гравитация&#10;if (entity.tickCount < 20) {&#10;    entity.setNoGravity(false);&#10;    data.remove(P+"x"); data.remove(P+"y"); data.remove(P+"z");&#10;    data.remove(TICK); data.remove(ACTIVE);&#10;    return;&#10;}&#10;&#10;// 🚫 Креатив/спектатор в полёте → ванильная физика&#10;if (entity instanceof net.minecraft.world.entity.player.Player player) {&#10;    if (player.getAbilities().flying && (player.isCreative() || player.isSpectator())) {&#10;        entity.setNoGravity(false);&#10;        player.getAbilities().setWalkingSpeed(0.1F);&#10;        player.getAbilities().setFlyingSpeed(0.05F);&#10;        player.getAbilities().mayfly = player.isCreative();&#10;        player.onUpdateAbilities();&#10;        data.remove(P+"x"); data.remove(P+"y"); data.remove(P+"z");&#10;        data.remove(TICK); data.remove(ACTIVE);&#10;        return;&#10;    }&#10;}&#10;&#10;// === 🔍 ОПРЕДЕЛЕНИЕ ГРАВИТАЦИИ (плоская логика) ===&#10;boolean hasGravity = true; // По умолчанию — гравитация есть&#10;&#10;// Проверяем измерение&#10;boolean inSpace = false;&#10;try {&#10;    inSpace = entity.level().dimension().location().toString().equals("ssc_14:spaced");&#10;} catch (Exception e) { inSpace = false; }&#10;&#10;if (inSpace) {&#10;    // Читаем глобальную переменную&#10;    boolean stationGravity = false;&#10;    try {&#10;        stationGravity = net.mcreator.ssc.network.Ssc14ModVariables.station_gravity;&#10;    } catch (Exception e) { stationGravity = true; }&#10;    &#10;    if (!stationGravity) {&#10;        hasGravity = false; // Глобально выключена&#10;    } else {&#10;        // Ищем пол&#10;        boolean foundFloor = false;&#10;        for (int dy = 1; dy <= 7; dy++) {&#10;            try {&#10;                var pos = net.minecraft.core.BlockPos.containing(x, y - dy, z);&#10;                if (entity.level().isLoaded(pos) && !entity.level().getBlockState(pos).isAir()) {&#10;                    foundFloor = true;&#10;                    break;&#10;                }&#10;            } catch (Exception e) { continue; }&#10;        }&#10;        if (!foundFloor) hasGravity = false; // Нет пола → невесомость&#10;        // Если foundFloor == true → hasGravity остаётся true (по умолчанию)&#10;    }&#10;}&#10;// Если !inSpace → hasGravity остаётся true (по умолчанию)&#10;&#10;// === 🔄 ВОССТАНОВЛЕНИЕ ФИЗИКИ ===&#10;if (hasGravity) {&#10;    entity.setNoGravity(false);&#10;    if (entity instanceof net.minecraft.world.entity.player.Player player) {&#10;        player.getAbilities().setWalkingSpeed(0.1F);&#10;        player.getAbilities().setFlyingSpeed(0.05F);&#10;        player.getAbilities().mayfly = player.isCreative();&#10;        player.onUpdateAbilities();&#10;    }&#10;    data.remove(P+"x"); data.remove(P+"y"); data.remove(P+"z");&#10;    data.remove(TICK); data.remove(ACTIVE);&#10;    return;&#10;}&#10;&#10;// === 🌌 НЕВЕСОМОСТЬ ===&#10;data.putBoolean(ACTIVE, true);&#10;if (data.contains(TICK) && data.getInt(TICK).orElse(0) == entity.tickCount) return;&#10;data.putInt(TICK, entity.tickCount);&#10;&#10;if (entity instanceof net.minecraft.world.entity.player.Player player) {&#10;    player.getAbilities().setWalkingSpeed(0.0F);&#10;    player.getAbilities().setFlyingSpeed(0.0F);&#10;    player.onUpdateAbilities();&#10;}&#10;entity.setNoGravity(true);&#10;&#10;if (!data.contains(P+"x")) {&#10;    var init = entity.getDeltaMovement();&#10;    data.putDouble(P+"x", init.x); data.putDouble(P+"y", init.y); data.putDouble(P+"z", init.z);&#10;}&#10;var vel = new net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3(&#10;    data.getDouble(P+"x").orElse(0.0),&#10;    data.getDouble(P+"y").orElse(0.0),&#10;    data.getDouble(P+"z").orElse(0.0)&#10;).scale(DAMPING);&#10;&#10;var old = entity.position();&#10;entity.move(net.minecraft.world.entity.MoverType.SELF, vel);&#10;var actual = entity.position().subtract(old);&#10;&#10;entity.setDeltaMovement(actual);&#10;data.putDouble(P+"x", actual.x);&#10;data.putDouble(P+"y", actual.y);&#10;data.putDouble(P+"z", actual.z);</field><next><block type="controls_if"><value name="IF0"><block type="logic_binary_ops" inline="false"><field name="OP">AND</field><value name="A"><block type="compare_dimensionids"><value name="a"><block type="entity_dimension_id"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></value><value name="b"><block type="get_dimensionid"><field name="dimension">End</field></block></value></block></value><value name="B"><block type="variables_get_logic"><mutation xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" is_player_var="false" has_entity="false"></mutation><field name="VAR">global:station_gravity</field></block></value></block></value><statement name="DO0"><block type="spawn_particle"><field name="particle">ASH</field><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="xs"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field></block></value><value name="ys"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field></block></value><value name="zs"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0</field></block></value><next><block type="java_code"><field name="CODE">&#10;// КОСТЫЛЬ ¯\_(ツ)_/¯</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
